overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a neon-drenched urban street at night. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements, wet reflective streets, and a mix of industrial and commercial elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a white jacket walking along the orange sidewalk under the overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing a white jacket and dark pants

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass with multiple support columns spanning the street
distinctive orange diamond-plate textured pedestrian walkway
green painted metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
multiple holographic advertisements displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' text with racing graphics
industrial metal lattice wall on right side of walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a pedestrian under a massive highway overpass. The environment is characterized by an orange textured sidewalk, green metal railings, and dense industrial architecture. Holographic 'PURE OVERKILL' advertisements line the overhead structure, casting colored light onto the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and vending machines

events.description: pedestrian in white jacket stops at arcade machine, ego continues past them
passing large green industrial dumpsters and trash bins on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a slot machine where the previous pedestrian stopped, approaching trash bins

entered.detail: blue and white arcade gambling machine with 'BIG' displayed on screen and colorful lights
circular neon sign with 'OPEN' text glowing in green on metal shutter
large industrial trash containers with corrugated metal lids and blue accents
wall with white skull graffiti and various tags

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the pedestrian who has stopped at a slot machine near a green neon 'OPEN' sign. The environment transitions to include industrial elements like green dumpsters and graffiti-covered walls while maintaining the orange sidewalk. The overpass structure recedes to the left as the street opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and neon-lit buildings

events.description: character turns right at intersection to cross the street
vehicle with headlights on passes through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating a street intersection, turning right to follow the crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking across the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: building with prominent purple neon strip lighting along the roofline and teal structural accents
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
orange pole with traffic lights and pedestrian crossing signals
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting neon lights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and navigates a wet urban intersection, turning right at the crosswalk. A building with distinctive purple neon lighting dominates the left side. The street surface reflects the neon lights, and a pedestrian in red crosses in the opposite direction while a vehicle passes through.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with continuous neon signage

events.description: passing building with bright continuous purple neon strip lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts with purple and pink neon lighting, following another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in dark clothing

entered.detail: continuous purple neon light strip running along building facade above sidewalk
multiple floating digital billboards displaying various advertisements and brand logos
metal roll-down security shutters on closed shops with vents

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a commercial street lined with purple neon lighting. Holographic advertising panels float above the street ahead, while metal shutters secure the storefronts on the right. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights as the character follows another pedestrian into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by following a character beneath a massive highway overpass, where orange sidewalks and green railings are bathed in the glow of holographic Pure Overkill advertisements. As the character moves past a pedestrian at a slot machine, the oppressive overhead structure recedes to the left, opening the view to graffiti-covered walls and industrial dumpsters. The scene then shifts toward a wet urban intersection, where the camera turns right past a building dominated by purple neon lighting that reflects vividly across the rain-slicked pavement. Finally, the path expands into a commercial street lined with secured storefronts and floating holographic panels, following the character and another pedestrian deeper into the glowing city.
